build.buildCommand: cd ../.. && rm -rf node_modules/.prisma node_modules/@prisma/client && npm install && cd apps/api && rm -rf node_modules/.prisma node_modules/@prisma/client && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && ls node_modules/.prisma/ && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: cd ../.. && cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/index.js
